title: 'If you kill Americans, we'll kill you': US releases montage of precision strikes with a blunt warning
summary_full: US Secretary of War Pete Hegseth issued a stark warning of lethal consequences for targeting Americans, amplified by CENTCOM on X. This declaration follows a joint US-Israel strike on Iranian territory that reportedly killed Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, leading to Iranian retaliatory strikes across the region. President Trump claimed significant neutralization of Iranian leadership and military capabilities.
